text: We will start the sigma web development course Why, how, what happened? course Have made a lot of sacrifices If you remember, I initially launched this course as a paid course But later many people said that web development is a basic thing And it would be great if you For years to come, it has become a very good resource to learn web development I have never made a course on the internet with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, ReactJS, MongoDB I have never made a full detail That don't do this Because if I will create a free resource Then paid courses will stop selling But again I made my decision I am not against any paid course seller In fact, if someone is selling paid And move forward in the same way With that said, now I will tell you How can you move forward in your journey from here We saw the front end in this course We saw the backend in this course We also definitely make a separate video for you about TypeScript But I also want to tell you that You can make very good projects without TypeScript Those projects in the industry Companies work hard to TypeScript, you can make very good projects Now I would like to talk about Git and GitHub Many people do not know Git and GitHub Which is a problem Because if you do not know Git and GitHub Then maybe you will not be able to code share in the industry Now it is very easy to learn Git and GitHub You guys definitely learn Git and GitHub by giving time And along with that, make your GitHub profile The make your profile fancy Now push your projects on GitHub So that you can see those projects And use it as a directory Suppose you used NextAuth in a project And now you have to use NextAuth in your new project So you can see the code from your old project You can refer it So it became your directory Along with that, I will recommend you Make your personal portfolio website and blog Means make a personal portfolio website and blog on the same website So that it is easy for people to contact you Plus, if you are able to write what you are learning in the blog form Then it will become an online directory for you Along with that, when you explain something Then you understand it better One more suggestion I want to give you is Make a very good LinkedIn profile And reach out to people daily So that you can explore new opportunities Now before doing this, it is very important for you to know something I have seen many people leave before finding a job And they don't know anything So first of all, you have to complete this course Learn web development completely And after that, you make some good projects And after that, you reach out to people Show them what you have done Now it may take you 6 months to 1 year After listening 6 months to 1 year, many people will run away That this is a very big time But in 6 months to 1 year, you can become a very dangerous web developer This is my claim from you if you have given the time well You can become in 3 months too But if I say a complete web developer Who handles things very well I keep a time window of 6 months to 1 year After this, there are many web development related or tech related events I will say that you go to those events And many events in Bangalore, Chennai You get to attend for free Many people miss it and think that it is a waste of time But I am telling you that it is not a waste of time If you make a balance and attend the events too Then you will get the opportunity to meet new people You will meet people in the industry who have the same thoughts as you And new opportunities will open up for you If you think that yes, I have reached a level now I have made many good projects I have done a very good job in the industry Related to web development So you can reach out to people through emails And I can give you a 95% guarantee That you will land a very amazing job Getting a job is not a big thing in web development If you know All the recruiters I meet tell me That there are a lot of people in the industry But very few good people So if you rise up as a good person Then you can definitely get a job After this, one more thing Meanwhile, until you are not getting a job What can you do You can build your own SaaS Software as a service Now again, you don't have to invest a lot of money in it You can start it as a hobby project Pick a problem and try to solve it Maybe make an invoice app Maybe make an app in which you can manage your data Make an app in which there are many web development related templates Make anything There are many things these days And you will get ideas Use chat gpt to explore ideas Now don't overuse chat gpt I have seen people in the industry overuse chat gpt They think they can do all the work with chat gpt You have to solve small problems with chat gpt For example, if you have to write a function Which is of four numbers Get the harmonic mean Maybe I will write it It will take time I will get it written with chat gpt It will be done soon Overall, don't hold your big problem chat gpt Make a video calling app for me You won't be able to make chat gpt Solve all the problems with chat gpt And the overall problem You will take control of it And yes, I would like to tell you one more thing Luck also matters Hard work also matters How much time you are giving also matters How much you are sleeping also matters How serious you are also matters So everything matters Don't blame anyone Take all the blame on yourself Keep yourself responsible And definitely you will move ahead in life I hope that by making this course For you In the web development industry I was able to bring some impact That's all for this course Thank you so much guys for watching this video And watching this course And I will see you next time
